text: As I enter this brightly lit space and pause in front of the glass doors, I sense an air of anticipation. Inside, the "R+D" wall invites inquiry—'Responsive and rapidly evolving.' The setting is modern, thoughtful, almost futuristic. I feel curious, even a bit cautious, wondering what possibilities and questions about humanity and technology might unfold in here. The vibrant colors and careful curation invoke a feeling that something significant is waiting to be understood.
